name: ryanconmeo
description: Claude Code plugins by Ryan Nguyen — Task Station: a persistent task hub where every task is a resumable, re-pinnable session, auto-categorised and colour-tinted, with in-project worker delegation.

plugins.name: task-station
plugins.description: An automatic, persistent task hub for Claude Code: every task is a resumable, re-pinnable Claude session — auto-categorised, colour-tinted, with parallel in-project worker delegation. The human-facing console alongside Claude's native Tasks.
